allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops gives natural-selection-analogy the evaluation cycle needed for variation, selection, and retention to work in practice.
allies.source_quote: iterative refinement mirror the feedback loops of natural selection

allies.rationale_text: Experimentation operationalizes natural-selection-analogy by generating variants and letting evidence eliminate weak options.
allies.source_quote: generate a multitude of ideas and let the environment select the winner

antagonists.rationale_text: Survivorship-bias distorts natural-selection-analogy when analysts study only the winners and ignore what failed variants would have revealed.
antagonists.source_quote: focusing only on the successful outcomes and not analyzing the failures

structured_tensions.tension_text: Natural-selection-analogy conflicts with second-order-thinking when "survival of the fittest" framing ignores second-order consequences like monoculture fragility or systemic brittleness.
structured_tensions.source_quote: natural-selection-analogy conflicts with second-order-thinking (second order thinking) when "survival of the fittest" framing ignores second-order consequences like monoculture fragility or systemic brittleness.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Natural-selection-analogy conflicts with simplification when evolutionary metaphors reduce complex organizational dynamics to simplistic competition framing that omits cooperation and regulation.
structured_tensions.source_quote: natural-selection-analogy conflicts with simplification (simplification) when evolutionary metaphors reduce complex organizational dynamics to simplistic competition framing that omits cooperation and regulation.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
